description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named BSD CI that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job strategy on ubuntu-latest to build on multiple BSD operating systems (FreeBSD, NetBSD, OpenBSD) and architectures (arm64, x86-64), with specific versions and package installations for each. Checkout the repository with submodules, use a ccache cache, and then use a cross-platform action to run a series of commands including package installation, cmake configuration, and build.
